Operation 'listLights' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks clarity about what is returned and doesn't explain the selector parameter's purpose. Added details about return value structure, selector usage, and clarified it's a read-only operation for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Gets lights belonging to the authenticated account. Filter the lights using selectors.
data.current_description: Gets lights belonging to the authenticated account. Filter the lights using selectors.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve lights for authenticated account with selector filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all lights belonging to the authenticated account, optionally filtered by the provided selector parameter. Returns a list of Light objects containing properties such as power state, color, brightness, and connectivity status. No side effects - this is a read-only operation.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about what is returned and doesn't explain the selector parameter's purpose. Added details about return value structure, selector usage, and clarified it's a read-only operation for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'setState' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is extremely vague about what state properties can be modified, what inputs are expected, and what the operation returns. Added specifics about request/response schemas, state properties, and side effects for AI agent clarity.

data.current_summary: Sets the state of the light within the selector.
data.current_description: Sets the state of the light within the selector.
data.summary_suggestion: Update light state properties for selected lights
data.description_suggestion: Updates the state of lights matching the selector. Accepts a SetStateRequestBody containing properties like power, color, brightness, and duration. Returns a SetStateResponse with results for each affected light. Modifies the actual state of the lights - changes are persistent and may trigger physical light changes.
data.reasoning: Original description is extremely vague about what state properties can be modified, what inputs are expected, and what the operation returns. Added specifics about request/response schemas, state properties, and side effects for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'setStates' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks details about the batch nature of the operation, request/response structure, and side effects. Enhanced to clarify that multiple selectors can be targeted simultaneously with different state values.

data.current_summary: Set different states on multiple selectors with a single request
data.current_description: Set different states on multiple selectors with a single request
data.description_suggestion: Updates state for multiple light groups in a single request. Accepts a SetStatesRequestBody containing an array of state updates, each targeting different selectors with their own state properties. Returns a SetStatesResponse indicating success or failure for each selector. Modifies the actual state of all matched lights - changes are persistent.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks details about the batch nature of the operation, request/response structure, and side effects. Enhanced to clarify that multiple selectors can be targeted simultaneously with different state values.

message: Operation 'setStateDelta' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is cryptic and doesn't explain the delta concept or its practical use. Added clarity about relative vs absolute changes, request/response details, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus setState.

data.current_summary: Set new state as delta of current state
data.current_description: Set new state as delta of current state
data.summary_suggestion: Apply incremental state changes to selected lights
data.description_suggestion: Applies incremental changes to the current state of lights matching the selector, rather than replacing the entire state. Accepts a SetStateDeltaRequestBody with delta values for properties like brightness, color, or duration. Returns a SetStateResult for each affected light. Useful for relative adjustments without needing to know the current state first.
data.reasoning: Original description is cryptic and doesn't explain the delta concept or its practical use. Added clarity about relative vs absolute changes, request/response details, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus setState.

message: Operation 'breathe' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description is too vague about what parameters are available and what the operation returns. Enhanced to specify the request/response schemas, clarify the animation behavior, and explain that the effect persists until overridden.

data.current_summary: Performs a breathe effect by slowly fading between the given colors. Use the parameters to tweak the effect.
data.current_description: Performs a breathe effect by slowly fading between the given colors. Use the parameters to tweak the effect.
data.description_suggestion: Applies a breathe effect to lights matching the selector, creating a smooth fade animation between specified colors. Accepts a BreatheEffectRequestBody with parameters for color, duration, period, and other animation properties. Returns a SetStateResult for each affected light. The effect runs continuously until another state change is applied.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description is too vague about what parameters are available and what the operation returns. Enhanced to specify the request/response schemas, clarify the animation behavior, and explain that the effect persists until overridden.
